nodes.label: PE risk - chest pain + DVT signs
Orbital complication – periorbital swelling or vision changes
Intracranial complication – severe headache or meningismus
Severe dyspnea – cyanosis or at rest
Possible ACS – chest pain with SOB
Possible PE – sudden onset + leg swelling
Possible SVT/AF with RVR and compromise
Altered mental status with systemic signs
Sudden vision loss is an emergency
BOOST CELL FEVER SPREAD V3 suppressor
ABX plus travel c diff risk
